summary: Backend-only testing for 3 critical bug fixes in CRM system. All 10 tests passed (1 skipped). Bug 1 (OrderBot stock check for manufactured items) - FIXED: is_manufactured correctly returns true and available serials are shown. Bug 2 (Duplicate order prevention) - FIXED: MongoDB unique indexes prevent duplicate entries. Bug 3 (Tracking ID exclude on dispatch) - FIXED: exclude_id parameter properly excludes pending_fulfillment entry when creating dispatch.
critical_code_review_comments: Bug 1 Fix VERIFIED: bot_prepare_dispatch (line 37566-37568) correctly checks both master_sku.get('product_type') == 'manufactured' and master_sku.get('is_manufactured', False)
Bug 1 Fix VERIFIED: Stock check for manufactured items uses finished_good_serials collection (line 37555-37562)
Bug 2 Fix VERIFIED: MongoDB unique indexes created on startup for amazon_order_id, order_id, and tracking_id (lines 99-111)
Bug 3 Fix VERIFIED: create_dispatch passes exclude_id=pending_fulfillment_id to validate_no_duplicates (line 4611)
Bug 3 Fix VERIFIED: check_tracking_id_duplicate accepts exclude_id parameter and excludes matching entry (line 1506-1519)
seed_data_creation: Test data already created by main agent: test-pf-manufactured-001 pending fulfillment entry with master_sku_id=test-manufactured-sku-001 (product_type='manufactured') and 3 serials (MFG-SERIAL-001,002,003) in firm c715c1b7-aca3-4100-8b00-4f711a729829
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three bug fixes verified: 1) OrderBot now correctly identifies manufactured items using product_type='manufactured' OR is_manufactured=True, and shows available serial numbers from finished_good_serials collection. 2) MongoDB unique indexes on pending_fulfillment collection prevent duplicate amazon_order_id, order_id, and tracking_id entries. 3) When creating dispatch from pending_fulfillment, the tracking_id duplicate check excludes the source pending_fulfillment entry via exclude_id parameter. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_85_bug_fixes.py covers all three bugs.

bug_1_orderbot_manufactured_stock.description: OrderBot falsely reports 'No Stock Available' for manufactured items
bug_1_orderbot_manufactured_stock.fix_details: Changed is_manufactured check from master_sku.get('type') to master_sku.get('product_type') == 'manufactured' or master_sku.get('is_manufactured', False)
bug_1_orderbot_manufactured_stock.test_result: API /api/bot/prepare-dispatch/{order_id} returns is_manufactured=True and available serials for manufactured items

bug_2_duplicate_order_prevention.description: Duplicate orders appearing in Pending Fulfillment queue
bug_2_duplicate_order_prevention.fix_details: Added unique MongoDB indexes on amazon_order_id, order_id, and tracking_id with sparse=True
bug_2_duplicate_order_prevention.test_result: Attempting to create duplicate entries returns 400 error

bug_3_tracking_id_exclude.description: Outbound Dispatcher says 'tracking ID is used' when processing pending fulfillment items
bug_3_tracking_id_exclude.fix_details: Added exclude_id=pending_fulfillment_id parameter to validate_no_duplicates when creating dispatch from pending_fulfillment
bug_3_tracking_id_exclude.test_result: Tracking ID duplicate check properly excludes the source pending_fulfillment entry
